item.title: Amplifying Innovation: The QS approach to technology development
item.description: I took on the CEO role last year because I see QuantumScape as the global leader in solid state battery technologies with an ability to revolutionize energy storage and create tremendous shareholder value in the process. We want to dramatically improve the performance of everything that uses a battery, starting with electric vehicles, and eventually including consumer electronics, stationary storage and emerging applications such as data centers, robotics, drones and aviation.

item.title: Our Strategic Blueprint
item.description: I took on the CEO role last year because I see QuantumScape as the global leader in solid state battery technologies with an ability to revolutionize energy storage and create tremendous shareholder value in the process. We want to dramatically improve the performance of everything that uses a battery, starting with electric vehicles, and eventually including consumer electronics, stationary storage and emerging applications such as data centers, robotics, drones and aviation.

item.title: A First Look at the QSE-5 B Sample
item.description: QuantumScapeвАЩs planned first commercial product, QSE-5, is a ~5 amp-hour cell designed to meet the requirements of automotive applications. Here, weвАЩll walk through the various elements of the cell specifications and explain some of the complexities behind the seemingly simple metric of energy density.

item.title: Understanding Battery Safety
item.description: Although electric vehicles are far less likely to catch fire than combustion-engine vehicles once a lithium-ion battery fire starts, it can be difficult to extinguish. As safe as a well-made conventional lithium-ion battery may be, there is significant room for improvement.

item.title: Interpreting QuantumScapeвАЩs Safety Test Results
item.description: In this blog article, we look at battery safety testing and do a deep dive into a couple of key test results from energy-dense 24-layer QuantumScape prototype cells based on our Alpha-2 design

item.title: EV Battery Cell Formats for Lithium Metal
item.description: You can find lithium-ion batteries in everything from electric vehicles to mobile phones. But, different applications have different requirements when it comes to the characteristics of the battery format, and EVs are a particularly challenging use case.

item.title: Introducing FlexFrame
item.description: QuantumScape's solid-state lithium-metal battery technology is designed to deliver disruptive improvements to electric vehicle performance.

item.title: News
item.description: Latest News at Northvolt

item.title: Energy density: The basics
item.description: There are many factors to consider when evaluating a batteryвАЩs energy density вАФ but it's not as straightforward as it may seem.

item.title: Energy density: Active materials & electrode loading
item.description: Using better active materials and optimizing the use of inactive materials are primary ways to improve energy density.

item.title: Ceramics 101: The QuantumScape Separator in Context
item.description: QuantumScapeвАЩs solid-state lithium-metal battery technology is enabled by our proprietary ceramic solid-electrolyte separator.

item.title: Our History - 2000s | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory

item.title: Media Contacts | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
item.description: The Office of Strategic Communications (OSC) is the primary contact between the Laboratory, the news media and the public. OSC prepares news releases, media advisories, statements on behalf of Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL), news and feature articles, fact sheets, brochures and other publications about the LaboratoryвАЩs work. OSC also:

item.title: Media Library | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
item.description: Science & Technology Review is published eight times a year to communicate, to a broad audience, the LaboratoryвАЩs scientific and technological accomplishments in support of national security and other enduring national needs. The publicationвАЩs goal is to help readers understand these accomplishments and appreciate their value to the individual citizen, the nation and the world.

item.title: Publications | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
item.description: Get insight into different corners of Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) with fact sheets outlining the work we do to support national security and advance science and technology.

item.title: Lab Report | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
Fact Sheets | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
item.description: Designing unique materials and innovations to fabricate structures with the properties and performance to address national security missions

item.title: Social Media | Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
item.description: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) is deeply engaged with our communities, from right here in California to our collaborators and friends around the world. LLNLвАЩs social media pages are great places to keep up with the LaboratoryвАЩs scientific breakthroughs, workplace culture and research opportunities. Follow and subscribe to our many channels to stay connected to everything thatвАЩs happening at the Lab.

item.description: About ORNL Review | ORNL

item.title: How MPEX will accelerate fusion energy | ORNL
item.description: MPEX lead engineer Aftab Hussain (right) explaining the MPEX power infrastructure to DOE Division Director for Fusion Enabling Science and Partnerships Heather Jackson on a tour of the facility with senior technical professional Doug Curry and MPEX project director John Sanseverino (on left). Credit: Carlos Jones/ORNL, U.S. Dept. of Energy

item.title: 2025 in review: ORNLвАЩs top science news stories | ORNL
item.description: The Department of EnergyвАЩs Oak Ridge National Laboratory marked another year of research driven by innovation and collaboration in 2025, as reflected in the laboratoryвАЩs most-read stories. The yearвАЩs top story announced two new AI supercomputers, establishing ORNLвАЩs vital role as part of DOEвАЩs Genesis Mission , a national initiative to accelerate science through artificial intelligence. From leveraging AI and advancing quantum technologies to strengthening materials and modernizing nuclear and advanced manufacturing, the yearвАЩs top stories highlight how ORNL applies big science for real-world impact.

item.title: Scientists visualize atomic structures in moir√© materials | ORNL
item.description: Researchers with the Department of EnergyвАЩs Oak Ridge National Laboratory and the University of Tennessee, Knoxville, have created an innovative method to visualize and analyze atomic structures within specially designed, ultrathin bilayer 2D materials. When precisely aligned at an angle, these materials exhibit unique properties that could lead to advancements in quantum computing, superconductors and ultraefficient electronics.

item.title: Query results
item.description: Portail Page d'Accueil du canal JCMS

item.title: Nuclear Energy Outlook Rev.Pdf
item.description: пњљQпњљoпњљdпњљ_пњљпњљпњљпњљ}7пњљпњљ]D1cпњљrЋЕdNпњљ+пњљпњљпњљi5ћЦпњљмѓНпњљ“®пњљ|пњљzyпњљT)пњљпњљпњљ%пњљпњљпњљпњљ%пњљ+2Pпњљ6пњљ;пњљpпњљпњљSпњљ‘Ч…£OYTпњљ%пњљWпњљ2пњљпњљпњљqпњљпњљwпњљuMnпњљkпњљ*пњљ пњљ„љY,gпњљпњљi&пњљпњљпњљhпњљпњљпњљпњљёњBпњљѕЧЌУпњљпњљ пњљпњљ1пњљ<пњљпњљ^\пњљпњљWkпњљRпњљпњљ пњљwёЄпњљпњљ0+пњљЌГпњљпњљпњљm4пњљпњљпњљпњљmпњљпњљJпњљAbZй©Јпњљпњљu|~пњљпњљпњљпњљIпњљпњљ$oпњљпњљBпњљ4пњљпњљпњљfпњљ6IPпњљпњљcпњљVS7пњљ[.>}»ТпњљпњљпњљK-пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ'пњљBпњљ пњљпњљпњљ%пњљ*bQ^Q3пњљпњљjпњљпњљ0пњљcWпњљ|пњљпњљFKпњљпњљ^WпњљBKрљЙЦTпњљпњљпњљпњљWпњљuпњљпњљпњљ61–®пњљпњљgпњљпњљ$iGaпњљqпњљ/ Mпњљi!S6ЌО+пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљўМпњљпњљpпњљпњљ(r∆Япњљloпњљ20M%_!пњљпњљYпњљN5“Юпњљvпњљпњљ”Њ>пњљ~u6пњљm7=пњљпњљпњљ]*пњљd/пњљпњљпњљпњљЁ™nпњљпњљ:пњљпњљ|VпњљпњљIпњљM…Љ…≠/пњљЋБпњљпњљ5пњљ;_QQz1Xпњљkпњљпњљuпњљ пњљp $iпњљпњљ,>=’Іпњљ% пњљпњљ*пњљпњљ‘≤j-пњљпњљ6#пњљNпњљпњљ}пњљtj:\vпњљ*\пњљC0пњљпњљпњљпњљ$пњљпњљпњљпњљяєGпњљfпњљcпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљrпњљ,wпњљE}ёђ\dпњљoRпњљiпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ<0пњљ?2;пњљЏЙпњљkfiпњљпњљпњљ8пњљSпњљпњљпњљ-пњљпњљпњљпњљ oM{пњљпњљ/пњљx~пњљj[пњљ пњљпњљIwXiпњљпњљ <пњљпњљ{пњљпњљRпњљпњљпњљkWVпњљпњљv)пњљ;E9пњљпњљпњљпњљoпњљпњљqjпњљ[oпњљпњљпњљW*пњљZM4пњљ{пњљ<пњљпњљYJпњљyU*FпњљпњљпњљTпњљпњљo8пњљQпњљпњљпњљпњљпњљVпњљ|пњљ2пњљпњљпњљпњљпњљ3(tЏ£пњљhпњљqЌЂ*пњљi)%]пњљпњљx~,9 пњљ[Rпњљ~пњљпњљпњљ~;пњљ?йЇШпњљпњљe(пњљ};пњљпњљпњљпњљќ•пњљпњљ.пњљпњљzпњљ%mпњљN [пњљпњљпµОпњљi„ЬпњљпњљVW6пњљ(пњљ*nJпњљiPпњљihпњљYпњљbпњљпњљ$‘ґ{2пњљпњљпњљпњљaпњљпњљK"пњљжњП,пњљпњљr\пњљпњљnпњљпњљxпњљпњљ„Бпњљlпњљпњљ|%пњљsпњљпњљпњљ:пњљ пњљ,5+$rпњљ&9eпњљ<пњљg,”У«Ъпњљ8д©®F6пњљQkпњљпњљ9пњљпњљ4пњљzпњљпњљ&пњљ>Sпњљпњљпњљпњљ*RпњљпњљпњљSпњљпњљпњљпњљG,пњљпњљGпњљпњљ

item.title: News
item.description: Alfen and CATL Reach 5 GWh Sodium-Ion Battery Storage Partnership in Europe

item.title: Alfen and CATL Reach 5 GWh Sodium-Ion Battery Storage Partnership in Europe
item.description: Alfen N.V., a leading European energy solutions provider, and Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited (CATL), the world's largest battery manufacturer, today announced their collaboration to deploy 5 GWh of CATL's advanced sodium-ion battery energy storage systems across Europe. This brings the two companies' long-standing partnership to a new level, opening a new chapter of diversified, technology-driven development supporting Europe's energy transition.

item.title: CATL Receives the 2026 Volkswagen Group Award
item.description: Recently, CATL was granted the 2026 Volkswagen Group Award. With outstanding overall performance in battery technology R&D, supply chain stability, and efficient global execution, CATL stands as the sole power battery manufacturer and the only enterprise from Chinese mainland to be recognized this year.

item.title: First Heavy-Duty Humanoid Robot Powered by CATL Batteries Goes Live in CATL Factory
item.description: CATL and Galbot have officially signed a global strategic cooperation agreement. The partnership will focus on upgrading smart manufacturing lines, accelerating the global expansion and large-scale application of AI humanoid robots, and jointly developing the world's first aftermarket service standard for AI humanoid robots.

item.title: CATL Debuts World's First Field-Validated Sodium-Ion BESS, Bringing Sodium Storage to Commercial Reality
item.description: Munich, Germany | June 22, 2026 вАФ CATL today officially unveiled the TENER Sodium Energy Storage System, the world's first real-world validated sodium-ion energy storage solution in Munich, Germany. The solution has reached full commercial maturity across technology, production capacity, and supply chain readiness. Cumulative shipments are expected to reach 1 GWh by the end of 2026, with global deliveries to begin in June 2027.

item.title: CATL Statement Regarding May 21, 2026 U.S. Congressional Report
item.description: CATL is aware of the report from the Select Committee on the Strategic Competition between the United States and the Chinese Communist Party, issued on May 21, 2026, titled "Bankrolling Beijing: U.S. Banks Raised Billions for a Chinese Military Company". The report was addressed to two banks, JPMorgan and Bank of America.

item.title: CATL Launches WorldвАЩs Largest Energy Storage Testbed, Advancing Industry into Era of Real-World Validation
item.description: Xiamen, China | May 28, 2026 вАФ CATL's Xiamen Energy Storage Validation Research Institute (ESVL), the world's largest and most comprehensive one-stop testing and validation platform in the industry, officially commenced operations on May 28th, marking a major step into the era of real-world validation for the industry.

item.title: CATL and Solarpro Technology AD recently commissioned BulgariaвАЩs largest battery energy storage
item.description: CATL, in collaboration with Solarpro Technology AD, has successfully connected a 602 MWh large-scale battery energy storage project in Bulgaria to the country's electricity grid. Located in Burgas, Bulgaria, the new facility marks a major milestone in the country's energy transition and increases its total energy storage capacity by 10%. It also strengthens the integration of renewable energy sources such as wind and solar while supporting the reliable and stable operation of the national power system.

item.title: CATL Subsidiary CAIT Partners up with Togg on Bedrock Chassis
item.description: Contemporary Amperex Intelligent Technology (Shanghai) Limited (CAIT), CATL's skateboard chassis arm, has entered into a strategic partnership with Turkish automotive brand Togg to jointly develop chassis platform for its new B-segment vehicle family, marking the first overseas passenger vehicle project for the platform.

item.title: Powering AustraliaвАЩs Energy Storage Future! CATL √Ч Zinfra to Launch a New вАЬProduct + ServiceвАЭ Model
item.description: Recently, Australian energy infrastructure service provider Zinfra and CATL (Contemporary Amperex Technology Co., Limited) officially signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to establish a strategic cooperation framework. The two parties will deliver and maintain large-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) projects in Australia, accelerating CATL's localization strategy in the Australian market.
